type_definitions.name: ReviewScopeConfig
type_definitions.description: Domain struct holding scope classification configuration. Pre-existing type — API surface is unchanged per OS-05 (domain API is not modified by this track). Referenced here to document the dependency used by ScopeQueryInteractor: classify(&[FilePath]) -> HashMap<ScopeName, Vec<FilePath>> performs the core routing; contains_scope(scope) validates scope names for the files command (AC-08); all_scope_names() returns the universe of named + implicit scopes for CN-07 universe compliance check. No serde derives in domain (hexagonal boundary). The struct is constructed by the infrastructure composition root via load_v2_scope_config.

type_definitions.name: FilePath
type_definitions.description: Validated repo-relative file path. Pre-existing domain value object. Referenced here because FilePath is the input type for ScopeQueryService::classify (IN-01, IN-03) and the output type for ScopeQueryService::files (IN-02). FilePath::new provides the string-level validation (Empty / Absolute / Traversal rejection) specified in CN-03 / AC-05. The CLI layer calls FilePath::new on each path argument and surfaces FilePathError as a human-readable error before invoking the service.

type_definitions.name: ScopeName
type_definitions.description: Review scope identifier enum. Pre-existing domain type. Main(MainScopeName) for named scopes; Other for the implicit unmatched scope. Referenced here because ScopeName is the scope parameter for ScopeQueryService::files (IN-02, IN-04, AC-08) and is produced by ReviewScopeConfig::classify / all_scope_names. The CLI layer accepts a scope name string and constructs ScopeName for the service call; unknown scope names are detected via contains_scope (AC-08).

type_definitions.name: MainScopeName
type_definitions.description: Validated named scope identifier. Pre-existing domain newtype (String wrapper). Validates: non-empty, ASCII only, not the reserved string 'other'. Referenced here because MainScopeName is the payload type of ScopeName::Main and of ScopeClassification::Named(MainScopeName, Vec<MainScopeName>). The at-least-one invariant of Named is enforced at the Rust type level via the head + tail tuple structure (Named(MainScopeName, Vec<MainScopeName>)), not by validating MainScopeName itself. Domain API is unchanged per OS-05.
